user.title: Connect to British Gas PAYG
user.description: Enter your British Gas online account credentials.

data_description.username: The email address you use to sign in to britishgas.co.uk.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate British Gas PAYG
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your British Gas credentials.

data_description.username: The email address you use to sign in to britishgas.co.uk.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email address or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to British Gas. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This British Gas PAYG account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The credentials entered belong to a different British Gas PAYG account.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch balance updates from British Gas. Minimum 60 minutes.
